title: better autoclicker
description: Fabric auto clicker for Minecraft 1.21.11 with fixed or randomized delay ranges for more human-like click patterns.
body:
Auto Clicker for Minecraft 1.21.11 on Fabric.

This version is based on the original Auto Clicker mod by Mikey / AdvancedXRay. Full credit for the base mod, original structure, and core functionality goes to the original author.

This build adds support for more natural click timing by allowing each action to use either a fixed delay or a randomized delay between configurable minimum and maximum values.

Features:
- Attack, use, and jump automation
- Fixed or randomized click delay
- Separate min/max delay values per action
- Cooldown-aware attack mode
- Shield-aware attack behavior
- Mob-only attack mode
- In-game configuration screen
- HUD status display

This release is focused specifically on Minecraft 1.21.11 and Fabric.
